Soma Isolux Kishangarh Beawar Tollway Private Limited for developing the existing two lane carrigeway to six lane dual carriageway configurations including strengthening of existing two lanes between km. 364.125 to km. 396.000 (km. 0.000) and km. 0.000 to km. 58.245 on the Kishangarh-Ajmer-Beawar Section of NH-8 in the State of Rajasthan under NHDP Phase ill on Design, Build, Finance, Operate and Transfer (DBF01) basis.
